reference: I have a spot in the back of my mouth. It is on the top and looks like a little circle. It is red around it but somewhat yellowish in the middle. I have no pain with it, and my throat is not sore. Sometimes I can feel it with the back of my tongue when I swallow, and sometimes I don't. What could this be?
text: I have a spot in the back of my mouth. It is on the top and looks like a little circle. It is red around it, but somewhat yellowish in the middle. I have no pain with it, and my throat is not sore. Sometimes I wet the back of my tongue when I swallow, and sometimes I don't. What could this be?
